impact: This creates the narrow handoff contract PP&D needs before invoking the read-only `ipfs_datasets_py` website archival processors, preserving PP&D policy provenance without forking processor implementation into `ppd/`.
summary: Add a PP&D-local archive adapter contract for `ipfs_datasets_py/ipfs_datasets_py/processors` with fixture-backed validation of processor metadata, content hash, source URL, backend path, and PP&D policy decision.
target_task: Task checkbox-41: Add a PP&D archive adapter contract that treats `ipfs_datasets_py/ipfs_datasets_py/processors` as the website archival backend and records processor name, version, content hash, source URL, and PP&D policy decision.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
